scenario: Bond Vigilante Duration Shock (10yr UST +35bps, VIX 26.5)
action_detail: Short Sovereign Yields — TLT Puts + ZB Futures Short + Short Nasdaq ETF (QQQ)
invalidation_criteria: Dovish Central Bank pivot OR unexpected CPI deceleration > 0.5% MoM
rationale: Catalyst is a structural regime shift: bear steepener at +35bps over 5 sessions with VIX > 25 confirms market is re-pricing terminal rate higher. Dalio Debt Cycle Framework identifies this as Phase 3 — tightening cycle transmission into equity multiple compression. Macro Titan expresses view unhedged, amplifying the catalyst directionally. Long-duration tech (QQQ, ARKK proxies) explicitly shorted as the primary transmission mechanism of rate repricing into equity multiples.
behavioral_note: Unlike constrained capital pools, Macro Titan has a 30-day VaR window and 10% monthly drawdown tolerance — providing mandate to hold through counter-trend noise while thesis resolves. This is the Bridgewater 'Beautiful Deleveraging' thesis inverted: an unbalanced tightening is structurally bearish for duration.
deafness_protocol: NOT ENGAGED — Macro Titan operates on aligned time horizon to resolve thesis within stated 3-12 month window.
